name: Progress
purpose: Communicates completion or advancement through a clear, token-driven progress bar.
whenToUse: Use when a task, upload, migration, or checklist has measurable progress worth surfacing.
Use a value label when the numeric percentage helps clarify state.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for binary success or failure states that a Badge or Alert communicates more clearly.
Do not fake precise progress when the system only knows coarse loading states.
accessibilityRequirements: Expose current, minimum, and maximum values through accessibilityValue.
Provide a label when the meaning of the progress bar is not obvious from nearby copy.
